description:
As a user
  I want to navigate through the application
  So that I can access different pages with proper state management

steps.name: I should see the home page content
the home template should be rendered
I should see the About page content
the page title should be "À propos"
the about template should be rendered
the about page script should be initialized
the previous page cleanup should be executed
I should see the user profile for 123
the page title should be "User Profile"
the user template should be rendered
I should see search results for "test"
the search template should be rendered
the page title should be "Page Not Found"
I try to access a protected page
I should be redirected to the login page
the login template should be rendered
I am on a page with active scripts
I navigate to a new page
the previous page cleanup should be executed
the new page script should be initialized
the content should be updated after the transition
I click on an internal link
the navigation should be handled by the router
the page should not be reloaded
the browser history should be updated
I should go back to the previous page
the page cleanup should be executed
I click on an external link
the navigation should be handled by the browser
I visit a page with reactive state
the page script should be initialized
the reactive state should be set up
the UI should respond to state changes
I am on a page with active event listeners
the previous page event listeners should be removed
the previous page timers should be cleared
the previous page state should be cleaned up
the new page should be properly initialized
I navigate quickly between multiple pages
each page cleanup should execute properly
the final page should be active
I am on a specific page
the current page should be rendered correctly
the page script should be initialized
the URL should remain the same

name: Front-end Router

steps.name: I should see the home page content

the page title should be "À propos"

name: Routes

description:
As a bento generator user
  I want to use the application in my preferred language
  So that I can understand and interact with the interface effectively

steps.name: I visit the application for the first time
if the browser language is supported, it is set as current language
if the browser language is not supported, French is set as default
I have previously selected a language
the stored language preference is retrieved
the application uses the stored language
the language preference persists across sessions
all UI elements are translated to the new language
the language preference is saved to localStorage
I have translation data for multiple languages
the translation for the current language is returned
if the current language translation is not available, French is used as fallback
if no translation is found, 'Not found' is returned
I have UI elements with translation attributes
all elements with 'data-translate' attributes are updated
the text content reflects the new language
the translation keys are properly resolved
I check the available translation keys
action keys (add, delete, exchange, select) are available
content keys (ingredients, steps, export) are available
all keys have translations for supported languages
I have a translation object with missing languages
the system falls back to French if the current language is missing
the system returns 'Not found' if no translations are available
no errors are thrown for missing translations
the language preference is stored under this key
I have elements that need translation updates
all elements with translation attributes are found
their text content is updated with new translations
the UI reflects the language change immediately
each translation has a French (fr) property
the structure is consistent across all translations

name: Translation and internationalization

description:
As a bento generator user
  I want to see the current application version
  So that I can track updates and report issues accurately

steps.name: I am on any page of the application
the version is retrieved from package.json
the version is displayed in the designated element
the version element is found by ID 'version'
I have a version element in the DOM
the version element's text content is updated
the version matches the package.json version
the version is imported from package.json
the version constant is available for use
the version format follows semantic versioning
the version element is not present in the DOM
the function handles the missing element gracefully
the application continues to function normally
the version is visible to the user
I check the version in different parts of the application
the version is consistent across all components
the version matches the package.json version
I have a version from package.json
the version is a valid string
the version can be parsed correctly
the version is typically displayed in the footer
no cleanup is required for the version system

name: Application version management
